Product Details:
Fanra Heaters Industrial M Type Finned Tubular Heating Element
M-Type Finned Tubular Heating Elements are specially designed for applications requiring efficient heat transfer and durability in challenging environments. These heating elements feature a metal sheath with high-grade fins attached to increase the surface area, enhancing heat dissipation. The "M-Type" design refers to their unique shape, which provides uniform heating and better mechanical stability. These elements are typically used in air heating, drying ovens, and forced air heating systems, where rapid and consistent heat is essential. They are resistant to corrosion, have a long lifespan, and are available in various sizes and power ratings to meet specific industrial requirements.

Product Details:
Fanra Heaters Finned Tubular Heaters All Sizes
Finned Tubular Heaters by FANRA HEATERS
FANRA HEATERS manufactures Finned Tubular Heaters designed for applications that require efficient heat transfer and high performance. These heaters are ideal for air, gas, and liquid heating in a variety of industrial processes, providing enhanced heat dissipation with the help of finned structures.
Technical Specifications
Material:
Sheath: Stainless steel, Incoloy, or mild steel for durability and corrosion resistance.
Heating Element: High-quality nickel-chromium (NiCr) resistance wire.
Voltage: Available in 110V, 230V, and 415V; custom voltages upon request.
Wattage: Customizable from 0.5 kW to 25 kW.
Temperature Range: Operates up to 650C (1202F), ideal for high-temperature applications.
Insulation: Magnesium oxide (MgO) for high thermal conductivity and electrical insulation.
Length: Custom lengths available from 100mm to 3000mm based on requirements.
Diameter: Typically available in 8mm to 25mm, with custom sizes for specific applications.
Fins: Aluminum or copper fins designed to increase surface area for efficient heat transfer.
Mounting: Available in a variety of mounting options, including brackets, flanges, or threaded ends.
Key Features
Enhanced Heat Dissipation: The finned design increases the surface area for more effective heat transfer, making them suitable for heating air, liquids, and gases.
Corrosion Resistant: Made from stainless steel or Incoloy, ensuring longevity even in corrosive environments.
Customizable Sizes: Available in various lengths, diameters, and wattages to meet specific heating needs.
Energy Efficient: Delivers efficient heating while minimizing energy consumption.
Versatile Applications: Ideal for heating air, gases, and liquids in industrial heating, drying, and processing systems.
Applications
Air Heating: Used in industrial ovens, dryers, and air heaters.
Liquid and Gas Heating: Suitable for water, oil, and gas heating systems.
Industrial Processes: Used in various manufacturing and processing industries that require consistent and reliable heat.
HVAC Systems: Ideal for use in heating, ventilation, and air conditioning (HVAC) applications.
FANRA HEATERS’ Finned Tubular Heaters provide reliable, high-performance heating solutions for a wide range of industrial applications. With customizable options and excellent durability, they ensure effective heat transfer and long-term efficiency. Contact us for more information on how these heaters can meet your industrial heating needs.

Product Details:
Fanra Heaters 18 KW Flange Immersion Heater With Box 
The flange immersion heater with box is a heavy-duty industrial heating solution designed for heating liquids such as water, oils, chemicals, or gases. It features multiple tubular heating elements mounted on a robust metal flange, typically made from corrosion-resistant materials like stainless steel or brass. These elements are inserted directly into tanks or vessels, making them ideal for immersion applications.The heater comes equipped with a protective electrical connection box, which houses the wiring and terminals, ensuring safety and protection from external elements such as moisture, dust, and mechanical damage. The box is typically made from durable metal or weather-resistant materials, ensuring longevity and reliable performance in industrial environments.This type of heater is widely used in industries such as chemical processing, oil refining, food and beverage, and water treatment, providing efficient heat transfer and easy installation. The combination of the flange design and protective box ensures safe operation and ease of maintenance, making it a preferred choice for heating fluids in large-scale industrial processes.

catalog_items.description: Mica chakri heaters are specialized heating elements used in industrial applications for heating cylindrical surfaces such as pipes, tubes, and barrels. They feature a resistance heating element wound around a mica-insulated core, enclosed in a metal sheath with a spiral or helical configuration.

Mica Chakri Heaters - OD 4 Inch - 230Volt, 250Watt

For more details click the link below:
https://www.indiamart.com/proddetail/...

Product Details:
Mica Chakri Heaters - OD 4 Inch - 230Volt, 250Watt
Mica chakri heaters are specialized heating elements used in industrial applications for heating cylindrical surfaces such as pipes, tubes, and barrels. They are designed with a resistance heating element wound around a mica-insulated core, enclosed in a metal sheath with a spiral or helical configuration. This spiral design allows for efficient and uniform heat distribution along the cylindrical surface being heated.
Mica chakri heaters are commonly used in plastic extrusion machines, packaging equipment, and other industrial processes requiring precise and consistent heating. They are known for their rapid heat-up times, high-temperature capabilities, and durability in harsh environments. These heaters are available in various sizes, wattages, and configurations to suit different heating requirements, making them a reliable choice for heating cylindrical objects in industrial settings.

The compact design and precise construction allow for efficient heating.

Mica Nozzle Heater

https://www.indiamart.com/proddetail/...

Product Details:
Mica Nozzle Heater
Mica nozzle heaters are specialized heating elements designed to heat the nozzles of plastic injection molding machines and other equipment. They are constructed with a resistance heating wire wrapped around a mica-insulated core, which is then encased in a metal sheath. The compact design and precise construction of mica nozzle heaters allow for efficient and uniform heating of the nozzle, ensuring optimal performance in plastic processing applications.
These heaters are known for their fast heat-up times, high-temperature capabilities, and resistance to moisture and chemicals. They play a crucial role in maintaining consistent temperature profiles during injection molding processes, contributing to quality production and reduced downtime. Mica nozzle heaters come in various sizes and configurations to fit different nozzle diameters and heating requirements, making them a popular choice in the plastics industry.

Fanra Heaters 18 KW Flange Immersion Heater With Box 
The flange immersion heater with box is a heavy-duty industrial heating solution designed for heating liquids such as water, oils, chemicals, or gases. Product Details:
Mica Chakri Heaters - OD 4 Inch - 230Volt, 250Watt
Mica chakri heaters are specialized heating elements used in industrial applications for heating cylindrical surfaces such as pipes, tubes, and barrels. They are designed with a resistance heating element wound around a mica-insulated core, enclosed in a metal sheath with a spiral or helical configuration. This spiral design allows for efficient and uniform heat distribution along the cylindrical surface being heated.
Mica chakri heaters are commonly used in plastic extrusion machines, packaging equipment, and other industrial processes requiring precise and consistent heating. They are known for their rapid heat-up times, high-temperature capabilities, and durability in harsh environments. These heaters are available in various sizes, wattages, and configurations to suit different heating requirements, making them a reliable choice for heating cylindrical objects in industrial settings.

Mica Nozzle Heater
Mica nozzle heaters are specialized heating elements designed to heat the nozzles of plastic injection molding machines and other equipment. They are constructed with a resistance heating wire wrapped around a mica-insulated core, which is then encased in a metal sheath. The compact design and precise construction of mica nozzle heaters allow for efficient and uniform heating of the nozzle, ensuring optimal performance in plastic processing applications.
These heaters are known for their fast heat-up times, high-temperature capabilities, and resistance to moisture and chemicals. They play a crucial role in maintaining consistent temperature profiles during injection molding processes, contributing to quality production and reduced downtime. Mica nozzle heaters come in various sizes and configurations to fit different nozzle diameters and heating requirements, making them a popular choice in the plastics industry.
